zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Osbaldeston於1177年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓時，他的父親Ailsius de Osbaldeston28歲，母親Wimara25歲。他於大約1207年與Mrs William De Balderston結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1224年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Osbaldeston于1177年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓时，他的父亲Ailsius de Osbaldeston28岁，母亲Wimara25岁。他于大约1207年与Mrs William De Balderston结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1224年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Osbaldeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Osbaldeston (Lancs), which is recorded as Osbaldeston in 1246 and Osbaldiston in 1258. The place-name derives from the Old English personal name Osbald + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Albiston
meanings: English: (i) variant of Albinson , altered (with intrusive t) as if derived from a place-name. Compare Alliston . (ii) possibly a variant of Osbaldeston , from Osbaldeston (Lancs), which has a local pronunciation [ˈɔːbɪstn].

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Osbaldeston was born in 1177, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ailsius de Osbaldeston, was 28 and his mother, Wimara, was 25. He married Mrs William De Balderston about 1207. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1224, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Osbaldeston est né en 1177, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ailsius de Osbaldeston, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Wimara, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mrs William De Balderston environ 1207. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1224, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Osbaldeston 1177 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ailsius de Osbaldeston 28 und seine Mutter Wimara 25. Er hat um 1207 Mrs William De Balderston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1224 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Osbaldeston è nato il nel 1177 nel Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ailsius de Osbaldeston, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Wimara, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mrs William De Balderston circa 1207. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1224, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Osbaldestonが1177年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンで生まれた時，父Ailsius de Osbaldestonは28歳，母Wimaraは25歳であった。約1207年にMrs William De Balderstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1224年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Osbaldeston(이)가 1177년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ailsius de Osbaldeston(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Wimara(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1207년 Mrs William De Balderston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1224년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Osbaldeston nasceu em 1177, em Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ailsius de Osbaldeston, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Wimara, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs William De Balderston aproximadamente 1207. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1224, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Osbaldeston родился в 1177 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ailsius de Osbaldeston было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Wimara, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs William De Balderston около 1207 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1224 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Osbaldeston nació en 1177, en Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ailsius de Osbaldeston, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Wimara, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mrs William De Balderston aproximadamente 1207. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1224, a la edad de 47 años.
